explanation: Original command line used for testing. No mutation applied.
Inserted escape characters (double backslashes) in the file path to test parsing behavior.
Removed quotes around the value name to test if the command still functions without them.
Reordered the arguments to test if the command still functions correctly with a different argument sequence.
Used double quotes around the registry path and value name to test if the command still functions with additional quoting.
Replaced the absolute path with an environment variable to test path normalization and variable expansion.
Omitted the trailing slash in the registry path to test if the command still functions correctly.
Used short option form (e.g., /V instead of /Value) to test if the command still functions with equivalent syntax.
